content:
The user wants me to extract data from the provided image and format it as a JSON object. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a page from a Texas Instruments datasheet for the TPS562200 and TPS563200. It contains: - Header with the Texas Instruments logo and document title. - Section 6 "Specifications". - Section 6.1 "Absolute Maximum Ratings". - A table listing absolute maximum ratings. - A note explaining the ratings. - Section 6.2 "ESD Ratings". - A table listing ESD ratings. - Notes explaining the ESD ratings. - Section 6.3 "Recommended Operating Conditions". - A table listing recommended operating conditions. - Footer with copyright and product links. **2. Extract data step-by-step:** * **Header:** * Logo: Texas Instruments * Document Title: TPS562200, TPS563200 * Document Number/Date: SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023 * Website: www.ti.com * **Section 6: Specifications** * Title: 6 Specifications * **Section 6.1: Absolute Maximum Ratings** * Title: 6.1 Absolute Maximum Ratings^(1) * Note: $T_J = -40^{\circ}C$ to $150^{\circ}C$ (unless otherwise noted) * Table: * Columns: (Implicit), MIN, MAX, UNIT * Rows: * VIN, EN: -0.3, 19, V * VBST: -0.3, 25, V * VBST (10-ns transient): -0.3, 27.5, V * VBST (vs SW): -0.3, 6.5, V * VFB: -0.3, 6.5, V * SW: -2, 19, V * SW (10-ns transient): -3.5, 21, V * Operating junction temperature, $T_J$: -40, 150, °C * Storage temperature range, $T_{stg}$: -55, 150, °C * **Note below table:** * (1) Stresses beyond those listed under absolute maximum ratings may cause permanent damage to the device. These are stress ratings only, and functional operation of the device at these or any other conditions beyond those indicated under recommended operating conditions is not implied. Exposure to absolute-maximum-rated conditions for extended periods may affect device reliability. * **Section 6.2: ESD Ratings** * Title: 6.2 ESD Ratings * Table: * Columns: (Implicit), VALUE, UNIT * Rows: * $V_{(ESD)}$, Electrostatic discharge, Human body model (HBM), per ANSI/ESDA/JEDEC JS-001, all pins^(1): ±2000, V * Charged device model (CDM), per JEDEC specification JESD22-C101, all pins^(2): ±500 * **Notes below table:** * (1) JEDEC document JEP155 states that 500-V HBM allows safe manufacturing with a standard ESD control process. * (2) JEDEC document JEP157 states that 250-V CDM allows safe manufacturing with a standard ESD control process. * **Section 6.3: Recommended Operating Conditions** * Title: 6.3 Recommended Operating Conditions * Note: $T_J = -40^{\circ}C$ to $150^{\circ}C$ (unless otherwise noted) * Table: * Columns: (Implicit), MIN, MAX, UNIT * Rows: * $V_{IN}$, Supply input voltage range: 4.5, 17, V * $V_I$, Input voltage range, VBST: -0.1, 23, V * VBST (10-ns transient): -0.1, 26 * VBST(vs SW): -0.1, 6 * EN: -0.1, 17 * VFB: -0.1, 5.5 * SW: -1.8, 17 * SW (10-ns transient): -3.5, 20 * $T_A$, Operating free-air temperature: -40, 85, °C * **Footer:** * Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated * Submit Document Feedback * Page 5 * Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200 **3. Format as JSON:** Construct the JSON object based on the extracted data. ```json [{"bbox": [85, 34, 247, 80], "category": "header", "text": "Texas Instruments\nwww.ti.com"}, {"bbox": [638, 56, 913, 81], "category": "header", "text": "TPS562200, TPS563200\nSLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023"}, {"bbox": [89, 97, 243, 113], "category": "title", "text": "6 Specifications"}, {"bbox": [89, 115, 376, 133], "category": "title", "text": "6.1 Absolute Maximum Ratings\\(^{(1)}\\)"}, {"bbox": [89, 140, 385, 155], "category": "text", "text": "$T_{J} = -40^{\\circ}C$ to $150^{\\circ}C$ (unless otherwise noted)"}, {"bbox": [90, 154, 906, 331], "category": "table", "text": "
MINMAXUNIT
Input voltage rangeVIN, EN-0.319V

VBST (10-ns transient)-0.327.5V
VBST (vs SW)-0.36.5V
VFB-0.36.5V
SW-219V
SW (10-ns transient)-3.521V
Operating junction temperature, \\(T_{J}\\)-40150°C
Storage temperature range, \\(T_{stg}\\)-55150°C
"}, {"bbox": [89, 339, 898, 378], "category": "text", "text": "(1) Stresses beyond those listed under absolute maximum ratings may cause permanent damage to the device. These are stress ratings only, and functional operation of the device at these or any other conditions beyond those indicated under recommended operating conditions is not implied. Exposure to absolute-maximum-rated conditions for extended periods may affect device reliability."}, {"bbox": [89, 386, 232, 402], "category": "title", "text": "6.2 ESD Ratings"}, {"bbox": [90, 409, 906, 475], "category": "table", "text": "
VALUEUNIT
V(ESD)Electrostatic dischargeHuman body model (HBM), per ANSI/ESDA/JEDEC JS-001, all pins^(1)±2000V
Charged device model (CDM), per JEDEC specification JESD22-C101, all pins^(2)±500
"}, {"bbox": [89, 484, 791, 497], "category": "text", "text": "(1) JEDEC document JEP155 states that 500-V HBM allows safe manufacturing with a standard ESD control process."}, {"bbox": [89, 497, 791, 510], "category": "text", "text": "(2) JEDEC document JEP157 states that 250-V CDM allows safe manufacturing with a standard ESD control process."}, {"bbox": [89, 519, 442, 535], "category": "title", "text": "6.3 Recommended Operating Conditions"}, {"bbox": [89, 542, 385, 556], "category": "text", "text": "$T_{J} = -40^{\\circ}C$ to $150^{\\circ}C$ (unless otherwise noted)"}, {"bbox": [90, 556, 906, 733], "category": "table", "text": "

"}, {"bbox": [86, 950, 342, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated"}, {"bbox": [704, 950, 872, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Submit Document Feedback"}, {"bbox": [902, 951, 913, 962], "category": "footer", "text": "5"}, {"bbox": [363, 975, 636, 988], "category": "footer", "text": "Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200"}] ```
